title: Fun Green & White Novelty Yes Button - (1 Pc.) - Perfect for Office, Desk, or Gift
features: EYE-CATCHING DESIGN: Stand out from the crowd with this fun green & white novelty yes button, featuring a sleek white body and vibrant green button to grab attention and spark conversation.
DURABLE & HIGH-QUALITY MATERIAL: Crafted with top-notch materials, our novelty button ensures long-lasting use and durability, making it the ideal addition to your office or home workspace.
INSTANT STRESS RELIEF: Press the green button for a satisfying and amusing "YES!" sound – a fun and unique way to blow off steam, break up the monotony, and brighten your day.
VERSATILE & THOUGHTFUL GIFT: Perfect for office desks, workspaces, or as a quirky present for co-workers, friends, and family – everyone will love this entertaining and functional pick-me-up!
READY TO USE: Each Fun green & white novelty yes button comes with 2 x AAA batteries included, so you can start enjoying your new stress-relieving companion right away.
description: This novelty button will say 'YES' out loud when you press it! Offering 10 different press-to-speak phrases that do everything from agree and affirm, to cheer for great accomplishments.
